title: Oggy And The Cockroaches
desc: Oggy, a happy cat, struggles when three cockroaches move into his home, turning peace into trouble as they constantly irritate and outsmart him every day.

title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
desc: Oggy, a cat, loves to spend his time watching television and eating, except for the three cockroaches who are always out to get him and make his life miserable with their antics.

title: Oggy and the Cockroaches
desc: Oggy sets up a pair of binoculars to spy on the cockroaches. Meanwhile, inspired opportunists, the roaches take advantage of his drowsiness to put a binocular lens underneath each eyelid.
